verif_result.fix_hint: Simulation completed but values disagreed. max_error=13 across 131072 samples. See first_mismatch_* and expected/got for raw evidence.
verif_result.verilator_stderr: Simulation completed but values disagreed. max_error=13 across 131072 samples. See first_mismatch_* and expected/got for raw evidence.
verif_result.classifier_reason: Simulation completed with correct timing (1 cycle) and correct output count (8192/8192), but values are uniformly low by ~1 (signed_error_sum=-117502, positive_error_count=0, all 71284 mismatches are negative). This is a classic requantization rounding error: the relu RTL is applying floor/truncation where the golden uses round-half-up (or vice versa), or the activation rescale multiply/shift is off by one in the rounding mode. The contract (flat-bus, 128b, int8_symmetric_per_tensor) is viable; no resource or bus-width constraint is violated. A targeted fix to the rounding expression in the requant path will resolve this.
